book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. JOHN

verses.text: \+w Let\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heart\+w* \+w be troubled\+w*: \+w ye believe\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w God\+w*, \+w believe\+w* \+w also\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w In\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father’s\+w* \+w house\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w many\+w* \+w mansions\+w*: \+w if\+w* \+add it were\+add* \+w not\+w* \+add so\+add*, \+w I would have told\+w* \+w you\+w*. \+w I go\+w* \+w to prepare\+w* \+w a place\+w* \+w for you\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w I go\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w prepare\+w* \+w a place\+w* \+w for you\+w*, \+w I will come\+w* \+w again\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w receive\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w myself\+w*; \+w that\+w* \+w where\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w*, \+add there\+add* \+w ye\+w* \+w may be\+w* \+w also\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w whither\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w go\+w* \+w ye know\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the way\+w* \+w ye know\+w*.
Thomas saith unto him, Lord, we know not whither thou goest; and how can we know the way?

Jesus saith unto him, \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w the way\+w*, \+w the truth\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the life\+w*: \+w no man\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w If\+w* \+w ye had known\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w ye should have known\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w also\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w henceforth\+w* \+w ye know\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w have seen\+w* \+w him\+w*.
Philip saith unto him, Lord, shew us the Father, and it sufficeth us.

Jesus saith unto him, \+w Have I been\+w* \+w so long\+w* \+w time\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w yet hast thou\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w known\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w Philip\+w*? \+w he that\+w* \+w hath seen\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w hath seen\+w* \+w the Father\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w sayest\+w* \+w thou\+w* \+add then\+add*, \+w Shew\+w* \+w us\+w* \+w the Father\+w*?

\+w Believest thou\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w am\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*? \+w the words\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w speak\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w I speak\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w myself\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w dwelleth\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w doeth\+w* \+w the works\+w*.

\+w Believe\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+add am\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w or\+w* \+w else\+w* \+w believe\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the very works’\+w* \+w sake\+w*.

\+w Verily\+w*, \+w verily\+w*, \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w He\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w believeth\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w the works\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w do\+w* \+w shall he do\+w* \+w also\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w greater\+w* \+add works\+add* \+w than these\+w* \+w shall he do\+w*; \+w because\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w go\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w ye shall ask\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w will I do\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w may be glorified\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the Son\+w*.
\+w If\+w* \+w ye shall ask\+w* \+w any thing\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w I\+w* \+w will do\+w* \+add it.\+add*
¶ \+w If\+w* \+w ye love\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w keep\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w commandments\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w will pray\+w* \+w the Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w he shall give\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w another\+w* \+w Comforter\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w he may abide\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w ever\+w*;

\+add Even\+add* \+w the Spirit\+w* \+w of truth\+w*; \+w whom\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w cannot\+w* \+w receive\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w it seeth\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w him\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w know\+w* \+w him\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w he dwelleth\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w you\+w*.
\+w I will\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w leave\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w comfortless\+w*: \+w I will come\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w Yet\+w* \+w a little while\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w seeth\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w more\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w see\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w because\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w live\+w*, \+w ye\+w* \+w shall live\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w At\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w day\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w shall know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I\+w* \+add am\+add* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w and I\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w He that\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w commandments\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w keepeth\+w* \+w them\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w loveth\+w* \+w me\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+w loveth\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w shall be loved\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w will love\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w will manifest\+w* \+w myself\+w* \+w to him\+w*.
Judas saith unto him, not Iscariot, Lord, how is it that thou wilt manifest thyself unto us, and not unto the world?

Jesus answered and said unto him, \+w If\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w love\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w he will keep\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w words\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w will love\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w we will come\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w him\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w make\+w* \+w our abode\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w*.

\+w He that\+w* \+w loveth\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w keepeth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w sayings\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w which\+w* \+w ye hear\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w mine\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w the Father’s\+w* \+w which sent\+w* \+w me\+w*.
\+w These things\+w* \+w have I spoken\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w being\+w* \+add yet\+add* \+w present\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w you\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w the Comforter\+w*, \+add which is\+add* \+w the Holy\+w* \+w Ghost\+w*, \+w whom\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w will send\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w name\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w shall teach\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w all things\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w bring\+w* \+w all things\+w* \+w to your\+w* \+w remembrance\+w*, \+w whatsoever\+w* \+w I have said\+w* \+w unto you\+w*.

\+w Peace\+w* \+w I leave\+w* \+w with you\+w*, \+w my\+w* \+w peace\+w* \+w I give\+w* \+w unto you\+w*: \+w not\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w giveth\+w*, \+w give\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w unto you\+w*. \+w Let\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w heart\+w* \+w be troubled\+w*, \+w neither\+w* \+w let it be afraid\+w*.

\+w Ye have heard\+w* \+w how\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w said\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w I go away\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w come\+w* \+add again\+add* \+w unto\+w* \+w you\+w*. \+w If\+w* \+w ye loved\+w* \+w me\+w*, \+w ye would rejoice\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w I said\+w*, \+w I go\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the Father\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w greater\+w* \+w than I\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w now\+w* \+w I have told\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w it come to pass\+w*, \+w that\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w it is come to pass\+w*, \+w ye might believe\+w*.

\+w Hereafter\+w* \+w I will\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w talk\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w you\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w the prince\+w* \+w of this\+w* \+w world\+w* \+w cometh\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w nothing\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w me\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w the world\+w* \+w may know\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I love\+w* \+w the Father\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w as\+w* \+w the Father\+w* \+w gave\+w* \+w me\+w* \+w commandment\+w*, \+w even so\+w* \+w I do\+w*. \+w Arise\+w*, \+w let us go\+w* \+w hence\+w*.
